gsm8k.source: wirbel #545 SERVED-by-default (177e776; uqnkzlf9 marker / 1r0l8nhg TPS, group base-fullhead-gsm8k-layerdrop): n=500 seed=1234 conc=32. base_fullhead=0.850 = sampled PRIMARY (425/500 = 96.8% of base 0.878, lewtun gen-config), empty/EOS 0.000 (was 10.4%); greedy arm 0.808 (404/500 = 92.0%, empty 0.000) ALSO clears >=90%. The min_tokens=8 floor now lives in the SERVE path (chat-scoped, /v1/chat/completions only) and recovers the first-token-EOS serving artifact at zero cost: served TPS 252.66 vs 252.49 no-guard (+0.16, in noise), PPL 2.006, greedy token-identity all run on the byte-identical /v1/completions. Promotes wirbel #541's request-level 0.854 to served-by-default. LM_HEAD_FULL_REQUIRE=1 verified 262144 rows. served(0.850) vs request-level(0.854) = a 2-item T=1.0 sampling diff, no served/request divergence.

aime.source: LANDED fern #535 (xtanouk7, merged 2f61dea, group base-fullhead-fast-ship-probe, finished, W&B-verified 7/7 MATCH; advisor relay 02:19Z). Matched-conc n=90, greedy T=0, identical item set. base (plain int4, --dtype auto) = 0.1222 (11/90, Wilson95 [0.0696,0.2057]); base_fullhead (fast stack) = 0.1444 (13/90, Wilson95 [0.0864,0.2316]). aime_fullhead_ge_base=TRUE (ratio 1.18; diff fh-base=+0.022, Newcombe95 [-0.079,+0.124] COVERS 0 => fast kernels do NOT cost reasoning at matched conc). EOS-empty 0.000 on all 3 draws; aime_leg_needs_min_tokens_guard=FALSE (first-token-EOS artifact ABSENT on AIME; min_tokens=8 recovery = +0.000 no-op) -- so as-served 0.1444 IS the apples-to-apples figure. Chaos bracket: run-to-run |dacc|=0.000 (13/90 on all 3 draws). UNDERPOWERED-VS-STRICT-BAR CAVEAT (advisor 02:19Z): vs the 0.90*base bar=0.110 the verdict is INCONCLUSIVE -- the point 0.1444 clears the bar but Wilson-lo 0.086 does not (n=90 maj@1 is chaotic; base itself only 0.122 at matched conc). meets_90pct here is the POINT-estimate gate (1.18 >= 0.90 => True); the CI-strict lower-bound test is inconclusive. Honest reading: not demonstrably below bar, and demonstrably NOT below base => 'quality-safe to the resolution our metrics allow'. MAX_NUM_SEQS=32 (conc=32) is LOAD-BEARING (the earlier -0.10/62.5pct AIME read was entirely a conc confound: fast@conc1 vs n=30 conc=32 base=0.267 high draw; at matched conc the sign flips).

mmlu_pro.source: BODY PRIOR (ubel #538 42L base-int4 body, GREEDY n=500/198, 8xo7bc3h merged 2ad4efe) ACCEPTED as the MMLU-Pro axis per advisor 01:56Z/02:19Z (see resolved_by). base 0.668 = advisor floor denominator (floor 0.601, PASS); base_fullhead body 0.668 = 100% of base. GPQA-D supplement: body 0.444 vs base 0.470 = 94.5% (floor 0.423, and Morgan #524 explicit floor 0.400, both PASS) -- see _body_prior_mmlu_gpqa. NOTE this is a non-served (greedy, body-in-isolation) acceptance, flagged accepted_non_served=True in the table -- NOT a served conc=32 measurement; stark #542 remains the optional direct served confirmation.
mmlu_pro.resolved_by: by_construction(head-identity)+benign-body-prior(ubel#538). Advisor 01:56Z ('once AIME lands you have a complete meets_90pct_all') + 02:19Z accepted the ubel #538 greedy body prior as the MMLU-Pro axis evidence in lieu of a served conc=32 cell. The full 262k head is base-identical BY CONSTRUCTION (prune OFF => no token -inf'd) and the 42L base-int4 BODY (= base_fullhead's exact body) is benign (int4 step -0.012/+0.061, layer-drop is the dominant knob), so the only remaining served deltas are the fast kernels + the first-token-EOS artifact, both shown CLEAN on the served GSM8K (#545) and AIME (this PR) cells. stark #542's matched conc=32 SERVED MMLU-Pro/GPQA is the OPTIONAL direct confirmation, NON-BLOCKING per the advisor.
